addons.name: Oscilloscope
addons.description: Classic green waveform scope that traces the live audio signal.
addons.author: kl3mta3

addons.name: Demucs v4 Stems
addons.description: Split local songs into Vocals, Drums, Bass and Melody (HTDemucs v4). Fast by default; fine-tuned mode in settings. Right-click a track > Demucs v4 > Get stems.
addons.author: kl3mta3

addons.name: Demucs 6s Stems
addons.description: Split local songs into 6 stems - Vocals, Drums, Bass, Guitar, Piano, Other (HTDemucs 6s). Right-click a track > Demucs 6s > Get stems.
addons.author: kl3mta3

addons.name: Karaokefy
addons.description: Turn a local song into karaoke: split with Demucs, mix an instrumental, transcribe the vocals with Whisper, and save synced .lrc lyrics. Right-click a track > Karaokefy > Make karaoke.
addons.author: kl3mta3

addons.name: Auto Lyrics
addons.description: Live on-screen lyrics for whatever's playing: transcribes the current local song with Whisper and shows the lines synced over the visualizer. Ephemeral (not saved). Enable to turn on; disable to stop.
addons.author: kl3mta3
